compilerOptions.//: Phase 3.2: scripts/*.ts were ported from .js as a mechanical rename. Astro extends the strict tsconfig but the legacy script files would need pervasive any/cast annotations across thousands of lines to satisfy strict checks — the runtime code already works in production and Playwright covers behavior. Drop strict but keep noFallthroughCasesInSwitch + noImplicitReturns for the bug classes that actually bite us; ambient globals in window-types.d.ts handle the cross-module ReferenceError class the Tier 1+2 plan was burned by.
